glosses.es: instructor del curso; profesor del curso
glosses.it: docente del corso; istruttore del corso
glosses.zh-Hans: 课程讲师; 课程负责人
glosses.yue: 課程導師; 課程負責人
glosses.pt: instrutor do curso; professor do curso
glosses.vi: giảng viên khóa học; người hướng dẫn khóa học
glosses.ro: instructor de curs; coordonator de curs
glosses.ja: 講師; コース担当者

sentences.target: Der Kursleiter kommt heute zu spät.

translations.de: Der Kursleiter kommt heute zu spät.
translations.en: The course leader is late today.
translations.fr: Le professeur est en retard aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Il docente oggi è in ritardo.
translations.vi: Giảng viên hôm nay đến muộn.
translations.nl: De docent is vandaag te laat.
translations.hi: आज शिक्षक देर से आए हैं.
translations.da: Kurslederen kommer for sent i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は講師が遅れて来ます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; marks the subject NP and agrees with 'Kursleiter'.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject.
Temporal adverb; modifies 'kommt' indicating the time (today).
Degree adverb; intensifies 'spät' (too late).
Adjective used adverbially/predicatively with 'kommen'; expresses lateness, modified by 'zu'.

sentences.target: Ich frage den Kursleiter nach dem Termin.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn ˈkʊʁslaɪ̯tɐ naːx deːm tɛʁˈmiːn/

translations.de: Ich frage den Kursleiter nach dem Termin.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn ˈkʊʁslaɪ̯tɐ naːx deːm tɛʁˈmiːn/
translations.en: I ask the course leader about the appointment.
translations.es: Le pregunto al profesor por la fecha.
translations.fr: Je demande au professeur la date.
translations.he: אני שואל את מדריך הקורס על המועד.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi giảng viên về lịch hẹn.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de docent naar de datum.
translations.hi: मैं शिक्षक से समय के बारे में पूछता हूँ.
translations.el: Ρωτάω τον καθηγητή για την ημερομηνία.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada instruktur tentang tanggalnya.
translations.ro: Îl întreb pe profesor despre dată.
translations.ja: 講師に日程を聞きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct object and a prepositional complement.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine; marks the direct object NP.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; head of the direct object NP (the person being asked).
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a PP complement meaning 'about/regarding'.
Definite article; dative singular masculine; within the PP required by 'nach'.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach' (what is being asked about).

sentences.target: Der Kursleiter erklärt die Aufgabe nochmal.

translations.de: Der Kursleiter erklärt die Aufgabe nochmal.
translations.en: The course leader explains the task again.
translations.es: El profesor explica la tarea otra vez.
translations.it: Il docente spiega di nuovo il compito.
translations.zh-Hans: 老师又讲了一遍作业要求。
translations.yue: 導師再講一次功課嘅要求。
translations.pt: O professor explica a atividade de novo.
translations.he: מדריך הקורס מסביר שוב את המטלה.
translations.vi: Giảng viên giải thích lại bài tập.
translations.nl: De docent legt de opdracht nog een keer uit.
translations.hu: Az oktató újra elmagyarázza a feladatot.
translations.hi: शिक्षक कार्य को फिर से समझाते हैं.
translations.el: Ο καθηγητής εξηγεί ξανά την άσκηση.
translations.nb: Kurslederen forklarer oppgaven en gang til.
translations.ja: 講師が課題をもう一度説明します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine; marks the direct object NP.
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object of 'erklärt'.
Adverb; modifies 'erklärt' indicating repetition.

sentences.target: Der Kursleiter schickt uns die Unterlagen später.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈkʊʁslaɪ̯tɐ ʃɪkt ʊns diː ˈʊntɐlaːɡən ˈʃpɛːtɐ/

translations.de: Der Kursleiter schickt uns die Unterlagen später.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈkʊʁslaɪ̯tɐ ʃɪkt ʊns diː ˈʊntɐlaːɡən ˈʃpɛːtɐ/
translations.en: The course leader will send us the materials later.
translations.es: El profesor nos enviará los materiales más tarde.
translations.fr: Le professeur nous enverra les documents plus tard.
translations.it: Il docente ci manderà i materiali più tardi.
translations.zh-Hans: 老师稍后会把资料发给我们。
translations.yue: 導師稍後會將資料發畀我哋。
translations.pt: O professor vai nos enviar os materiais mais tarde.
translations.he: מדריך הקורס ישלח לנו את החומרים מאוחר יותר.
translations.vi: Giảng viên sẽ gửi tài liệu cho chúng tôi sau.
translations.nl: De docent stuurt ons de materialen later.
translations.hu: Az oktató később elküldi nekünk az anyagokat.
translations.hi: शिक्षक हमें सामग्री बाद में भेजेंगे.
translations.el: Ο καθηγητής θα μας στείλει τα υλικά αργότερα.
translations.nb: Kurslederen vil sende oss dokumentene senere.
translations.id: Instruktur akan mengirimkan materi kepada kami nanti.
translations.sv: Kursledaren kommer att skicka materialet till oss senare.
translations.ro: Profesorul ne va trimite materialele mai târziu.
translations.da: Kursuslederen vil sende os materialet senere.
translations.fi: Kurssin vetäjä lähettää meille materiaalit myöhemmin.
translations.ja: 講師は資料をあとで送ってくれます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; ditransitive with an indirect (dative) and direct (accusative) object.
Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, dative; indirect object/recipient of 'schickt'.
Definite article; accusative plural; marks the direct object NP.
Common noun; plural; accusative; direct object (thing being sent).
Temporal adverb (comparative form); modifies 'schickt' to indicate a later time.

es: Le pregunto al profesor por la fecha.
El profesor explica la tarea otra vez.
El profesor nos enviará los materiales más tarde.
fr: Le professeur est en retard aujourd'hui.
Je demande au professeur la date.
Le professeur nous enverra les documents plus tard.
it: Il docente oggi è in ritardo.
Il docente spiega di nuovo il compito.
Il docente ci manderà i materiali più tardi.

老师稍后会把资料发给我们。
yue: 導師再講一次功課嘅要求。

pt: O professor explica a atividade de novo.
O professor vai nos enviar os materiais mais tarde.

מדריך הקורס מסביר שוב את המטלה.
מדריך הקורס ישלח לנו את החומרים מאוחר יותר.
vi: Giảng viên hôm nay đến muộn.

Giảng viên giải thích lại bài tập.
Giảng viên sẽ gửi tài liệu cho chúng tôi sau.
nl: De docent is vandaag te laat.
Ik vraag de docent naar de datum.
De docent legt de opdracht nog een keer uit.
De docent stuurt ons de materialen later.
hu: Az oktató újra elmagyarázza a feladatot.
Az oktató később elküldi nekünk az anyagokat.

Ο καθηγητής εξηγεί ξανά την άσκηση.
Ο καθηγητής θα μας στείλει τα υλικά αργότερα.

Profesorul ne va trimite materialele mai târziu.
